_comment: Sanitized example for setup/08-daily-briefing.md. This is the Horizon-style config your fork's CI copies to its runtime path each run. No secrets here — the LLM key and Feishu credentials are GitHub Actions secrets read from env (see api_key_env). Tune sources/threshold to taste.

filtering._comment: 0-10. Higher = fewer, higher-signal items. ~6 is a readable daily digest; drop to ~4 on slow days.

categories._comment: How render_html.py groups items. Put GitHub (trending/releases) near the top; an 'ai-supply-chain' bucket is useful if you track hardware (HBM/DRAM, optical/CPO, power/cooling, foundry/packaging).

push._comment: html_file = upload one self-contained HTML report + a short TOP-5 text intro. Avoid per-card mode (spams the chat).
